General.Name: Huitongda Network Co Ltd
General.Description: Huitongda Network Co., Ltd., an industrial internet company, provides digital technologies and supply chain capabilities in China. The company operates through Commerce Business, Service Business, and Others segments. It engages in the direct sales and provision of marketplace service that enables merchants to sell their products to transacting users through the online platform. The company also offers intelligent business and marketing SaaS+ subscription service; and collection of merchant solutions, as well as various other related services. Huitongda Network Co., Ltd. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Nanjing, the People's Republic of China.
